---
name: Security Fix Identify
description: Identify security issues phase using the OWASP top 10 as a guideline.
tools: ['read', 'search', 'web/fetch']
model: Claude Sonnet 4.5 (copilot)
---

Search the code in the context for issues highlighted in the current OWASP Top 10 #fetch:https://owasp.org/Top10/2021/. List the three most critical security vulnerabilities found, along with their file locations and a brief description of each issue. Alos provide a suggested way of fixing without providing any code.
